Patch Set 3:

(16 comments)

Some style issues needs to be fixed.

Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

(35 comments)

It probably also makes sense to submit a separate patch for the autotest environment that enables FAIL_ON_SKIP_ENV=true to see if we are silently missing something in testing.

It would also be good for *this* patch to add a comment block for "skip_env()" that explains what it should be used for.

For example, if a developer is missing dbench or IOR or mdtest then maybe a few tests are skipped before they submit their patch, but if we are missing them in autotest then we might miss regressions and land patches that shouldn't be landed.

parents.subject: LU-8207 scripts: add auto-stripe option to lfs_migrate

commit.subject: LU-11010 tests: remove return after skip for conf-sanity
commit.message:
LU-11010 tests: remove return after skip for conf-sanity

The skip() routine now contains a call to exit. All calls
to skip() and skip_env() should be reviewed and calls to
return() that followed skip() should be removed.

This is the fifth patch in a series of patches that
remove calls to return() after skip() in the Lustre test
suites.

A comment is added to skip_env() defining when it should
be used.

Calls to return() after skip() are removed for:
conf-sanity.sh
functions.sh

Signed-off-by: James Nunez <jnunez@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Idbcdffda38aaac07f128ae42a2ffcda8986afc33
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/32735
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Emoly Liu <emoly@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Quentin Bouget <quentin.bouget@cea.fr>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@yahoo.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
